'''janodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fmole|fmole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fmole|fmole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| janodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jænedheth|jænedheth]] || [[word:jænedhej|jænedhej]] || [[word:jænedhesh|jænedhesh]] || [[word:jænedhe|jænedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:janonodhoth|janonodhoth]] || [[word:janonodhoj|janonodhoj]] || [[word:janonodhosh|janonodhosh]] || [[word:janonodho|janonodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:janodhoth|janodhoth]] || [[word:janodhoj|janodhoj]] || [[word:janodhosh|janodhosh]] || [[word:janodho|janodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:janofdhoth|janofdhoth]] || [[word:janofdhoj|janofdhoj]] || [[word:janofdhosh|janofdhosh]] || [[word:janofdhof|janofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:janodhotho|janodhotho]] || [[word:janodhojo|janodhojo]] || [[word:janodhosho|janodhosho]] || [[word:janodhoko|janodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:janodhoth|janodhoth]] || [[word:janodhoj|janodhoj]] || [[word:janodhosh|janodhosh]] || [[word:janodho|janodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:janodhothol|janodhothol]] || [[word:janodhojol|janodhojol]] || [[word:janodhoshol|janodhoshol]] || [[word:janodhokol|janodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:janodhothotho|janodhothotho]] || [[word:janodhojojo|janodhojojo]] || [[word:janodhoshosho|janodhoshosho]] || [[word:janodhoko|janodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:janodhothon|janodhothon]] || [[word:janodhojon|janodhojon]] || [[word:janodhoshon|janodhoshon]] || [[word:janodhokon|janodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:janodhothoro|janodhothoro]] || [[word:janodhojoro|janodhojoro]] || [[word:janodhoshoro|janodhoshoro]] || [[word:janodhokoro|janodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
